events.title: US presses Meta to agree to AI reviews as security concerns rise: report
events.summary: The Facebook parent, ​which launched the Muse Spark AI model in April, is the only major U.S. ​developer of AI technology that has not reached an agreement to voluntarily share its models with the federal government for review, according to ​the report.
